branch.frontier_task_title: v6.6 frontier: Integrate Archmap into AOF governed development flow
branch.branch_summary: After v6.5.0, advance v6.6 as Archmap-aware Mission Control: AOF should update or explicitly evaluate an Archmap architecture map as governed work progresses, while Mission Control projects map refs and map-impact state without becoming the source of truth.

tree_answer.where_are_we: TASK-071 sits on v6.6 after shipped v6.5.
tree_answer.why_this_branch: Maintain v6.5.0 as the Execution Hygiene and Command Safety baseline, then use v6.6 to make AOF development Archmap-aware: every implementation-grade work item should update, defer, or explicitly mark architecture map impact as unaffected, with Mission Control rendering the current map ref, map-impact state, blockers, and runtime proof.
tree_answer.what_branch_comes_next: Start TASK-071: v6.6 frontier: Integrate Archmap into AOF governed development flow
